goal.statement: GetAJob is production-grade, launchable, and easy for non-technical users to install and use.
stopping_conditions: getajob init creates working .env + profile + search vectors interactively
getajob doctor pre-flights API key, db, browser, config
3 default search vectors ship so first run produces results
pip install getajob works (PyPI or test PyPI)
Browser submission degrades gracefully without Chromium
docker compose up works for first-time user
scope_boundaries: Do NOT create new agent modules
Do NOT refactor browser engine internals

work_items.title: Build getajob init command
work_items.description: Interactive CLI wizard that creates .env, user profile, and 3 default search vectors
work_items.verification: echo test@example | getajob init -> .env exists, profile exists, search vectors exist

work_items.title: Add default search vectors
work_items.description: Ship 3 pre-configured search vectors (software engineer remote, data scientist, product manager) so first run produces results
work_items.verification: getajob discover produces listings without user creating vectors

work_items.title: Build getajob doctor command
work_items.description: Pre-flight check that validates API key, database connection, browser availability, and config sanity
work_items.verification: getajob doctor exits 0 when all checks pass, prints clear messages per check

work_items.title: Graceful browser degradation
work_items.description: If Chromium/Playwright not installed, browser submission exports the application URL for manual submission instead of crashing
work_items.verification: run without playwright installed -> graceful message, not traceback

work_items.title: Approval queue route tests
work_items.description: FastAPI TestClient tests for auth, health endpoint, dashboard, stats API, and login flow
work_items.verification: pytest tests/ includes approval queue tests, all pass

work_items.title: Docker compose first-time UX
work_items.description: Ensure docker compose up works for a first-time user with no setup
work_items.verification: docker compose up -> server starts, healthcheck passes, wizard accessible

next_steps: All 7 items completed. Review for additional iterations.
